summary: Classified the maintainer-owned PR inventory shard using the provided preflight artifact as live state. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, or security-route actions are planned; low-signal closeout, merges, and fix PRs are disabled or blocked by the job frontmatter. PRs that are draft, dirty, failing proof, waiting on author, very broad, or requiring maintainer/product judgment are retained for maintainer review.
